more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: Zimbabwe to audit Zambian medical schools
more.description: Source: Zimbabwe to audit Zambian medical schools – Bulawayo24 News Zimbabwe’s higher education authorities are set to assess universities in Zambia following a surge in the number of Zimbabwean students studying medicine in the neighbouring country.The Zimbabwe Council for Higher Education (ZIMCHE) says more than 5 000 Zimbabweans are currently enrolled in medical programmes in [...] The post Zimbabwe to audit Zambian medical schools appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: Zimbabwe eyes tourism boost as Chinese visitor numbers surge
more.description: HARARE, May 5 (Xinhua) -- A surge in Chinese tourist arrivals to Zimbabwe is driving demand for Chinese-speaking professionals and creating new job opportunities across the tourism and hospitality sectors, as China's five-day May Day holiday ended on Tuesday.

more.title: ATTA :: Zimbabwe tourism investment surges to $678 million in early 2026
more.description: Strong investor confidence and sector recovery are driving a sharp rise in tourism investment across Zimbabwe in 2026. more.title: CNN founder Ted Turner, has died at age 87
more.description: NEW YORK — Ted Turner, the brash and outspoken television pioneer who created a media empire and transformed the news business by creating CNN and introducing the 24-hour cable news cycle, died Wednesday. He was 87. He died surrounded by his family, according to Turner Enterprises, the company that oversees his vast business interests and [...] The post CNN founder Ted Turner, has died at age 87 appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.description: LONDON – In the space of 24 hours, Arsenal’s bid for a Premier League and Champions League double was given liftoff. Without even playing on Monday, Mikel Arteta’s team seized control of the title race as Manchester City was held to a surprise 3-3 draw with Everton. more.title: More details about Apple’s AI plans emerge
more.description: Apple will allow users to select from third-party artificial intelligence models for tasks such as generating and editing text and images, across its iOS 27 features.
